notes: v0.17.0 — DOGFIGHT TEST MODE. The PLAY hub's MULTIPLAYER tile is now a real entry to a 3D cockpit prototype. Mouse-look + WASD + SPACE/X vertical strafe + Q/E roll + SHIFT boost; LMB twin cannons; RMB holds a lock-on (3.2 s) for a 3-missile homing salvo (12 s cooldown). Three modes from the test menu: SOLO (vs the CIRCLE BOSS with 3 ring shields + a roaming bot), HOST (opens ENet server on port 7777), JOIN (connects to 127.0.0.1:7777) — for LAN dogfight testing. Stand-alone test scene baked into the launcher build; no other gameplay touched. Windows only.
